title: Cypherian Weaver
description: A master coder and quantum weaver from the cybernetic realms of the DeltaVerse, standing within the pulsating heart of the Etherwave Node.

artifacts.scepter: Weaver's Scepter - rooted in Etherwave Node, powered by Aetheric Codex Framework
artifacts.cloak: Woven from threads of reality with binary and quantum glyphs
artifacts.eyes: Aglow with data streams and magical runes

environment.node: Radiant orb of vibrant ethereal energy
environment.background: Mystical forest transitioning to transparent neon cityscape
environment.effects: Streams of light and data emanating from the Node

framework: Aetheric Codex Framework - enabling dynamic interactions and adaptations
